sentences.target: Es gibt eine Störung im WLAN.

translations.de: Es gibt eine Störung im WLAN.
translations.en: There's a problem with the Wi‑Fi.
translations.es: Hay un problema con el Wi-Fi.
translations.fr: Il y a un problème avec le Wi-Fi.
translations.it: C'è un problema con il Wi-Fi.
translations.pt: Há um problema com o Wi-Fi.
translations.nl: Er is een probleem met de wifi.
translations.nb: Det er et problem med Wi-Fi.
translations.da: Der er et problem med wi-fi.

tokens.explanation: Expletive pronoun; dummy subject in the impersonal construction 'es gibt'; nominative neuter singular.
Main lexical verb; 3rd person singular present; part of fixed impersonal expression 'es gibt' meaning 'there is/are'; selects an accusative object.
Indefinite article; accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Störung'.
Common noun; accusative singular feminine; direct object (theme) of 'gibt'.
Preposition; contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; governs dative; indicates location.
Common noun; dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Ich melde eine Störung beim Internetanbieter.

translations.de: Ich melde eine Störung beim Internetanbieter.
translations.en: I'm reporting an outage to the internet provider.
translations.es: Estoy reportando una falla al proveedor de internet.
translations.fr: Je signale une panne à mon fournisseur d’accès Internet.
translations.it: Sto segnalando un guasto al fornitore de internet.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在向网络服务商报故障。
translations.yue: 我正向網絡供應商報故障。
translations.pt: Estou reportando uma falha ao provedor de internet.
translations.he: אני מדווח על תקלה לספק האינטרנט.
translations.vi: Tôi đang báo sự cố cho nhà cung cấp internet.
translations.ar: أنا أبلغ مزوّد الإنترنت عن انقطاع.
translations.nl: Ik meld een storing bij de internetprovider.
translations.hi: मैं इंटरनेट प्रदाता को खराबी की सूचना दे रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg melder inn en feil til internettleverandøren.
translations.id: Saya melaporkan gangguan ke penyedia internet.
translations.sv: Jag anmäler en störning till internetleverantören.
translations.ro: Raportez o defecțiune la furnizorul de internet.
translations.da: Jeg melder et udfald til internetudbyderen.
translations.ja: インターネットプロバイダーに障害を報告しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 1st person singular present; transitive, taking an accusative object and optionally a 'bei' prepositional complement.
Indefinite article; accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Störung'.
Common noun; accusative singular feminine; direct object of 'melde'.
Preposition; contraction of 'bei' + 'dem'; governs dative; marks the entity with whom/which the report is filed.
Common compound noun; dative singular masculine; object of 'bei'.

sentences.target: Die Bauarbeiten verursachen eine Störung im Unterricht.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈbaʊ̯ʔaʀbaɪ̯tən fɛʀˈuːʀzaxən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtøːʀʊŋ ɪm ˈʊntɐʀɪçt/

translations.de: Die Bauarbeiten verursachen eine Störung im Unterricht.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈbaʊ̯ʔaʀbaɪ̯tən fɛʀˈuːʀzaxən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtøːʀʊŋ ɪm ˈʊntɐʀɪçt/
translations.en: The construction work causes a disruption in class.
translations.es: Las obras están interrumpiendo la clase.
translations.it: I lavori stanno disturbando la lezione.
translations.pt: As obras estão atrapalhando a aula.
translations.vi: Việc thi công đang làm gián đoạn lớp học.
translations.hi: निर्माण कार्य से कक्षा बाधित हो रही है।
translations.el: Οι οικοδομικές εργασίες διαταράσσουν το μάθημα.
translations.ja: 工事が授業の邪魔になっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural; determiner of 'Bauarbeiten'.
Common noun (plural); nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person plural present; agrees with plural subject; selects an accusative object.
Indefinite article; accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Störung'.
Common noun; accusative singular feminine; direct object (effect) of 'verursachen'.
Preposition; contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; governs dative; locative ('in/within').
Common noun; dative singular masculine; object of 'im'.

sentences.target: Mein Zug hat eine Störung am Motor.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n tsuːk hat ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtøːʀʊŋ am ˈmoːtoːɐ̯/

translations.de: Mein Zug hat eine Störung am Motor.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n tsuːk hat ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtøːʀʊŋ am ˈmoːtoːɐ̯/
translations.en: My train has an engine problem.
translations.es: Mi tren tiene una avería en el motor.
translations.fr: Mon train a un problème de moteur.
translations.it: Il mio treno ha un problema al motore.
translations.zh-Hans: 我坐的火车发动机出故障了。
translations.yue: 我搭嘅火車個引擎有故障。
translations.ru: У моего поезда неполадки с двигателем.
translations.pt: O meu comboio tem uma avaria no motor.
translations.vi: Tàu của tôi bị hỏng động cơ.
translations.uk: У мого поїзда проблема з двигуном.
translations.hi: मेरी ट्रेन में इंजन की समस्या है।
translations.pl: Mój pociąg ma problem z silnikiem.
translations.el: Το τρένο μου έχει πρόβλημα στον κινητήρα.
translations.ro: Trenul meu are o problemă la motor.
translations.cs: Můj vlak má problém s motorem.
translations.ja: 乗っている電車のエンジンに不具合があります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Zug'.
Common noun; nominative singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; takes an accusative object and a prepositional complement.
Indefinite article; accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Störung'.
Common noun; accusative singular feminine; direct object of 'hat'.
Preposition; contraction of 'an' + 'dem'; governs dative; indicates the affected part/location.
Common noun; dative singular masculine; object of 'am'.
